summary: Added a light time bridge into the opening and shifted the closing to land on Noor's lost authority and the corridor handoff into chapter 14 rather than repeating chapter 12's Ember-message ending shape.
edits: Added an opening time anchor to smooth the transition from the prior chapter's hallway aftermath into the pod-floor dossier reveal.
Trimmed the final beat so the chapter closes on Noor's social collapse and the wet-cough corridor handoff instead of a second near-identical Ember coda.
